prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Mika Dawncrest in layered blue robes and Mika Ironleaf in a green half-cape standing before a wooden quest board; Mika Dawncrest points to a specific parchment, his blue robes flowing slightly as he gestures, Mika Ironleaf leans in closely to inspect the document with an alert expression, moonlit warm guild aesthetic, cinematic camera, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika Ironleaf nods, reaching out to trace a path on the map pinned to the board with her finger, while Mika Dawncrest watches intently, his hand resting near his grimoire, they coordinate their movements to finalize the mission plan, consistent identities and camera, no text, no watermark.
